name: filleted_box_parametric
_comment: Variant of the filleted_box demo with a parametric (rhs-bound) radius. The radius binds to S1B_TB_CAP_T (a thickness defined in s1b_conveyor_locals.txt, value 3.0mm) -- not a real fillet variable, just exercising the {rhs} path on a fillet dim. Run WITHOUT --no-dim to verify parametric binding works for fillets.
